GeneDef.label: abominationally ugly
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have an asymmetrical facial structure, rough skin, and an awkward figure. Their deformity is almost impossible to correct. But they find it attractive in each other.

customEffectDescriptions.li: Adds an additional <color=#8a8ae6>-40 opinion</color> without taking into account beauty.
Carriers <color=#8a8ae6>ignore the beauty</color> stat and have <color=#8a8ae6>+40 opinion</color> to each other.
